title: The Beginners Guide to Instant Pot
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A beginner-friendly guide to mastering the Instant Pot with simple, approachable recipes for everyday cooking.

title: Feather & Fin: AGS for 2
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Quick weeknight meals to impressive date night dinners — all poultry and seafood based, 100% Alpha-Gal safe. Proves that AGS doesn't mean sacrificing taste.

title: GalPal Cookbook: AGS
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: 66 carefully curated Alpha-Gal safe recipes from breakfast to dinner, with vegan options. Designed for those navigating alpha-gal syndrome without sacrificing flavor.

title: Rooted and Real Cookbook
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Garden-to-table recipes celebrating whole, organic ingredients. Clean, grounded cooking that honors the seasons.

title: Top Secret Treats
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Delightful treat recipes that are sneakily safe — hidden wholesome ingredients, allergy-friendly swaps, and crowd-pleasing flavors.

title: Too Tired to Stir
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Comforting, easy Alpha-Gal safe recipes for those days when energy is low but you still need to eat well. Perfect for chronic illness, fatigue, and recovery.

title: The Lazy Spoon
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Minimal effort, maximum flavor. Simple alpha-gal safe meals for busy days when you want good food without the fuss.

title: Healing With Intent
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A cookbook built around intentional nourishment — anti-inflammatory, clean recipes designed to support healing and recovery.

title: Soups On Cookbook
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A warming collection of hearty, nourishing soups — all alpha-gal safe, dairy-free, and packed with garden-fresh flavor.

title: Leo Puddlejump's Bumpy Ride
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Leo wants to be perfect, but his unicycle is wobbly. A heartwarming story about overcoming perfectionism and the joy of resilience.

title: Leo Puddlejump and the Silent Stage
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A story about finding your voice and discovering true bravery. Perfect for shy children or those facing a fear of speaking up.

title: Leo Puddlejump's Upside-Down Day
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: When rain ruins Leo's perfect plan, he learns to trade grumbles for splashes. About finding fun when things don't go your way.

title: Leo Puddlejump's Best Friend Blunder
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Leo breaks his best friend's favorite toy and must find the courage to tell the truth. About honesty, forgiveness, and friendship.

title: Adelyn's Greatest Adventure
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A spirited adventure story for young readers starring a brave and curious little girl ready to take on the world.

title: Adelyn & Aiden's Fabulous Day at the Park
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A joyful day in the park turns into a fabulous adventure for siblings Adelyn and Aiden. A celebration of imagination and family.

title: Aiden and the Land of the Dinosaurs
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Aiden tumbles into a prehistoric world of dinosaurs and daring! A roaring adventure for little dino lovers.

title: Flip Flop the Flapping Frog
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A charming, rhyming story about a frog who flaps when he should hop — and discovers that being different is a superpower.

title: Leelan and the Amazing Dinner Roll
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: An imaginative tale about a child who discovers magic in the most unexpected place — a dinner roll! A whimsical story about wonder and mealtimes.

title: Huxley Pimpernickel and the Great Grassy Gulp of Dino-Land
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A tongue-twisting, laugh-out-loud adventure with Huxley Pimpernickel in a land of dinosaurs and grassy gulps.

title: Barnaby Blue and the Moon-Soot Mop
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Barnaby Blue has a very important job — mopping up moon-soot! A dreamy, imaginative bedtime adventure.

title: Goodnight Castles, Goodnight Crowns
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A lyrical bedtime story that says goodnight to castles, crowns, and all things royal. Perfect for little dreamers at the end of the day.

title: Pearl Knows: The Oakhaven Spirit Week Mystery
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Pearl has a knack for noticing things others miss. When Spirit Week at Oakhaven goes sideways, only Pearl can crack the case.

title: Toeki the Tadpole's Secret Dance
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Toeki the tadpole has a secret — he loves to dance! A joyful story about self-expression, being true to yourself, and finding your rhythm.

title: Puddles the Penguin's Pocket-Watch
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Puddles the penguin finds a magical pocket-watch and learns that time spent with friends is the most precious of all.

title: The Library Cat with the Paper-Clip Tail
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A mysterious library cat with a paper-clip tail leads curious readers on an adventure through the stacks. A love letter to books and reading.

title: The Teacup Dragon's Garden Secret
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A tiny dragon who lives in a teacup is hiding a beautiful secret in the garden. A magical, enchanting story for young readers.

title: The Secret Life of Fruit & Veggies
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: What do fruits and veggies get up to when nobody's watching? A fun, funny adventure encouraging healthy eating habits.

title: Button Bunny
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A sweet little bunny made of buttons goes on a heartwarming adventure about belonging and the magic of handmade things.

title: Rita Rocket's Race
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Rita builds her own rocket and races across the sky! An empowering STEM story about a girl who dares to dream big and go fast.

title: Boom-Bop Bird and the Big Bright Hat
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A noisy, colorful bird finds a big bright hat and the whole town notices! A joyful rhyming story about standing out and celebrating color.

title: Zig & Zag and the Giggle Machine
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Zig and Zag invent a machine that makes everyone giggle — but what happens when it won't stop? A hilarious STEM-flavored adventure.

title: Benji and the Library of Unspoken Words
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Benji discovers a magical library full of words nobody ever said — and realizes the most important words are the ones you finally speak.

title: The Ghost in the Group Chat
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: When a mysterious stranger joins the group chat, everything gets spooky — and exciting. A modern mystery for tech-savvy tweens.

title: Kallan and the Magic Soccer Ball
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Kallan discovers a soccer ball with magical powers — but the real magic is what he discovers about teamwork, heart, and never giving up.

title: Raina's Magical Reading Adventures
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Every book Raina opens takes her somewhere magical. A love letter to reading and the worlds that live inside books.

title: The Gravity Gremlins of Sector 7
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Tiny gremlins are messing with gravity in Sector 7 — and only a scrappy team of kids can stop them. Hilarious sci-fi adventure.

title: The Amazing Adventures of Mason and Rolland
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Mason and Rolland — two unlikely pantry pals — set off on an amazing adventure beyond the kitchen shelf.

title: The Unbelievable Adventures of David and Dillan the Pickle
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: David and Dillan the Pickle are back with even more unbelievable adventures from the pantry shelf to the great beyond.

title: Sophie and Saffron (the Beautiful Cupcake)
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Sophie and Saffron the cupcake discover that beauty — and friendship — come in all flavors.

series: The Chronicles of Simple Life Homestead
title: The Glitter-Saurus and the Midnight Shadow
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A glittery dinosaur and a mysterious midnight shadow — the first adventure in the Chronicles of Simple Life Homestead.

series: The Chronicles of Simple Life Homestead
title: Stadium in the Stars
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A sky-high adventure where the game is played among the stars. Part two of the Chronicles of Simple Life Homestead.

series: The Chronicles of Simple Life Homestead
title: The Secret of the Silver Harvest
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: The homestead holds a glittering secret — and the kids must uncover it before it's too late. A mystery wrapped in harvest magic.

series: The Chronicles of Simple Life Homestead
title: The Gate Keeper's Quest
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: The gate to the homestead hides a quest only the bravest can complete. Action, mystery, and heart in one gripping adventure.

title: Nollan and the Fox-Tail Badge
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Nollan must earn the legendary Fox-Tail Badge — but the trail through Timber Creek isn't what he expected.

title: The Signal in the Smoke
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A mysterious smoke signal deep in Timber Creek sets off a pulse-pounding race against time. Book two in the Badges series.

title: Alistair Finch and the Scout of the Cretaceous
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Alistair Finch uses a mysterious chrono-compass to travel to the Cretaceous period — where dinosaurs are the least of his problems.

title: Alistair Finch and the Scavenger of the Triassic Trial
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Alistair returns to prehistoric Earth for a scavenger hunt through the Triassic — but something is hunting him back.

title: The Girl with the Origami Map
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A girl discovers a hand-folded origami map that leads to worlds made entirely of paper — a breathtaking fantasy adventure.

title: The Taco Territory
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: A spicy, laugh-out-loud adventure set in the Taco Territory — where food is serious business and friendships are made over salsa.

title: Children's Christmas Coloring Book
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Festive Christmas scenes and characters for young colorists. Simple, joyful designs perfect for kids of all ages.

title: Children's Easter Coloring Book
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Springtime Easter scenes, bunnies, and eggs for little colorists. A bright and cheerful seasonal activity book.

title: Children's Halloween Coloring Book
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Not-too-spooky Halloween scenes for young colorists — pumpkins, ghosts, and candy galore!

title: Children's Holiday Activity Books
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Puzzles, mazes, word searches, and creative activities themed around the holidays. Hours of educational fun for kids.

title: Mother's Day Coloring Fun
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Beautiful floral and celebratory designs honoring mothers everywhere. A perfect gift or personal treat for Mother's Day.

title: Christmas Mandala Adult Coloring Book
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: 50 premium holiday-themed mandalas, decorated trees, and winter scenes. Intricate designs for a festive meditative escape.

title: Valentine's Day Adult Coloring Book
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Romantic florals, hearts, and love-themed intricate designs for a mindful Valentine's Day coloring experience.

title: Easter Adult Coloring Book
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Intricate spring florals, Easter mandalas, and nature-inspired designs for adult colorists celebrating the season.

title: Zen Gratitude Journal
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: 100 pages of daily gratitude prompts and free-write space in a striking black and gold design. A mindful daily practice.

title: Homesteading Journal
author: Rachel Baldwin
desc: Track your garden, harvests, livestock, and homestead life throughout the seasons. The perfect companion for simple living.
